subcodes.first_line: I bear witness that there is none other God but God, in affirmation of His oneness and in acknowledgment of His grandeur, and prayers and peace be upon His Prophets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد ان لا اله الا الله اقرارا بوحدانیته و اعترافا بعظمته و الصلوه و السلام علی انبیائه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
